Package i5.cb.api.notification

Class ViewTerm

  • java.lang.Object
    • i5.cb.api.notification.Term
      • i5.cb.api.notification.ViewTerm

  • public final class ViewTerm
extends Term
    representation of a single object that is instance of the view object. It is not necessarily, but likely, an individual.
